title: TTS — multi-speaker dialogue
summary: Render a scripted dialogue with two distinct prebuilt voices. The model assigns lines based on the speaker labels in the prompt body.
notes: MultiSpeakerVoiceConfig supports up to two speakers in the current preview. The speaker label in each SpeakerVoiceConfig must match the labels used in the prompt text.
Audio comes back as one stitched stream — speaker boundaries are baked into the PCM, not exposed as discrete segments. Re-cut with a downstream segmenter if you need separate tracks.
Style-control tags ([whispers], [excitedly]) work per line inside the dialogue body.
